prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction, the current price ($285.98) serves as the point estimate, assuming a short-term random walk without immediate external influences. The confidence intervals are estimated using a standard deviation model based on an assumed annualized volatility of 20% for UNH. This translates to a daily volatility of approximately 1.26%. The intervals are calculated by adding/subtracting multiples of this daily volatility (multiplied by the current price) corresponding to the Z-scores for a normal distribution for each confidence level (0.6745 for 50%, 1.2816 for 80%, and 1.6449 for 90%).
